LanguageData.VEF_Description_Schematic_Defaults.ruleP: subject->innovation's path
subject_story->unveiled simple truths behind complex phenomena
subject->seeds of tomorrow
subject_story->planted ideas that would grow into transformative solutions
subject_story->cultivated a garden of knowledge, ripe with potential
subject_story->nurtured the roots of change with care and foresight
subject_gerund->sowing the future with today’s discoveries
subject->the ripple of curiosity
subject_story->set forth waves of inquiry that echoed through time
subject_story->dropped pebbles of innovation into the pond of knowledge
subject_story->watched as one question led to another, expanding the circle of understanding
subject_gerund->casting stones to create waves of progress
subject_story->simplified the intricate to make way for practical applications
subject->the alchemy of progress
subject_story->merged disparate disciplines to unlock new realms of possibility
subject_story->turned the impossible into the inevitable through sheer ingenuity
subject_story->crafted solutions that reshaped the understanding of what's achievable
subject_gerund->blending science and magic into the fabric of reality
subject->the tapestry of discovery
subject_story->wove together threads of knowledge from the four corners of the world
subject_story->revealed patterns in the chaos, charting paths to untold innovations
subject_story->embroidered the annals of history with tales of serendipitous breakthroughs
subject_gerund->weaving the future from the loom of the present
subject_story->harnessed basic principles to achieve remarkable feats
subject->the crucible of creation
subject_story->fused raw elements into the building blocks of tomorrow
subject_story->tempered the fires of creativity to forge unprecedented technologies
subject_story->quenched the thirst for knowledge with the elixir of invention
subject_gerund->molding the raw materials of today into the artifacts of the future
subject->the beacon of enlightenment
subject_story->illuminated the dark corners of ignorance, guiding the way forward
subject_story->cast light on the unknown, making the unseen visible to curious minds
subject_story->ignited the flames of curiosity, kindling a worldwide pursuit of understanding
subject_gerund->lighting the torches of progress and knowledge
subject_gerund->streamlining the essence of discovery
subject->the frontier of knowledge
subject_story->crossed new horizons in the pursuit of understanding
subject_story->challenged the status quo with groundbreaking theories
subject_story->merged ancient wisdom with modern technology for innovative solutions
subject_gerund->pushing the boundaries of science and art
subject->the essence of innovation
subject_story->transformed everyday materials into extraordinary tools
subject_story->paved the way for future generations with sustainable practices
subject_story->harnessed the power of nature to fuel new advancements
subject_gerund->fostering an ecosystem of creativity and progress
subject->building blocks of progress
subject->the architects of tomorrow
subject_story->built the foundations for a utopia where technology serves all
subject_story->envisioned a future where harmony between technology and nature thrives
subject_story->crafted tools that empower humanity to reach its fullest potential
subject_gerund->laying the keystones for future landscapes
subject->exploratory leaps
subject_story->stepped boldly into uncharted territories of knowledge
subject_story->bridged the gap between the known and the unknown
subject_story->ventured where curiosity dared to lead
subject_gerund->embarking on journeys of discovery
subject_story->laid the groundwork for monumental leaps forward
subject->the essence of ingenuity
subject_story->transformed challenges into opportunities for growth
subject_story->applied creative thinking to overcome traditional obstacles
subject_story->crafted elegant solutions with a blend of art and science
subject_gerund->unlocking potential through innovation
subject->knowledge’s harvest
subject_story->gathered insights as one reaps the fields at harvest
subject_story->cultivated a bounty of understanding from the seeds of inquiry
subject_story->shared the fruits of research with the world
subject_gerund->reaping the rewards of relentless curiosity
subject_story->connected dots across disciplines to reveal new insights
subject->the puzzle of progress
subject_story->assembled the pieces of mystery to reveal the big picture
subject_story->matched theory with practice to solve longstanding puzzles
subject_story->uncovered hidden connections that unlocked new possibilities
subject_gerund->piecing together the elements of advancement
subject_story->crafted the foundation upon which future innovations stand
subject_gerund->laying down the keystones of advancement

LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.10: first_chapters->the first few chapters of this book describe the use of
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.11: first_chapters->first part of the book goes in detail about
inspired->Inspired by the bestselling book titled
inspired->A prequel to the popular book named
inspired->Based heavily on the book titled
inspired->In order to contradict the statement in
context_newspaper->This [newspaper] goes indepth about the [tale_noun] on [DATE].
context_newspaper->This [newspaper] tells the story of [tale_noun] on [DATE].
context_newspaper->This [newspaper] informs the reader about [tale_noun] on [DATE].
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.12: first_chapters->first few pages describe the use of
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.13: first_chapters->the beginning of the book revolves around
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.20: maybe_cont-> with emphasis on the use of [TerrainFeature]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.21: maybe_cont-> and how [Vegetable]s can be used to improve it
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.23: maybe_cont-> within the world of the [Animal]s
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.25: maybe_cont-> and compares it to a [NaturalObject]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.26: maybe_cont-> from the perspective of the [Enemy]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.27: maybe_cont-> based on experience from the middle of a [Community]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.28: maybe_cont->, with personal insights from a [Character]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.29: maybe_cont->, based on the interview with the minor celebrity [NamePerson]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.30: maybe_cont->, and how color [Color] was always associated with it
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.31: maybe_cont->, and how [Animal] can be used to improve it
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.32: maybe_cont->, describing various applications of [Weapon] within that field
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.33: maybe_cont->, based on the various surveys performed with [AdjectiveFriendly] [PersonJob]s
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.35: maybe_cont-> and how [ConceptPositive] and [ConceptPositive] improve it
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.37: middle_book->The author then proceeds to describe
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.38: middle_book->The following chapters allow the reader to contemplate on
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.40: middle_book->After that, the author went to great lengths to explain
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.41: middle_book->The middle of the book speaks about
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.44: ending->By the end of the book, emphasis is placed on
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.46: ending->Ending of the book is about
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.49: ending->The last part of the book is about
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.50: ending->Author decided to devote the last part of the book to
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.51: book_context->infused with the idea of [ConceptAny] and is done in a [bookstyle_adj] style

LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.62: maybe_writingstyles->, with a high amount of [bookstyle] and absolutely no [bookstyle]
LanguageData.VBE_BookUtility.rulePack.rulesStrings.63: maybe_writingstyles->. Author used a number of [bookstyle], mixed in with [bookstyle] and [bookstyle]

LanguageData.ArtDescription_NewspaperDesc.rulePack.ru: r_art_name->This newspaper goes indepth about the events of the last couple of days.
LanguageData.VME_DietyTypeMakerEldritch.rulePack.rule: r_deityType->The noise at the center of [concept]
LanguageData.ArtDescription_NeolithicFloorPaintingRoo: context_sentence->This [depiction] tells the story of [tale_noun] on [DATE].
LanguageData.VFE_NeolithicFloorPaintingDescriptionUti: activity->a scene of barter or trade
activity->a group engaged in artistic creation
artextra_clause->a group of [subimageplural] gathered near a [TerrainFeature]
artextra_clause->[Quantity_adjphrase] [subimagesingle]s illustrating a story from ancient times
artextra_clause->an intricate pattern of [subimageplural] dominates the foreground
artextra_clause->centered around a [subimagesingle], telling a tale of [ConceptAny]
subimagesingle->a representation of the sun or moon
side_position->to the right, forming a natural flow
side_position->to the left, drawing attention to the main theme
style_clause->reflecting the essence of [ConceptAny] through [artstyle_adj] patterns
style_clause->embodying a rich history with its [artstyle_adj] representation of [ConceptAny]
style_clause->the painting exhibits a [artstyle_adj] approach to [ConceptAny]
ConceptAny->the cycle of life and death
ConceptAny->the spiritual connection between man and the cosmos
ConceptAny->the harmony of the natural world
LanguageData.VCEV_CookingBook_Description.rulePack.ru: desc->This [writingQualityAdjective] [bookType] [follows] a [chef] as [protagHe] [storyStruggles]. [writingQualitySentence]. [maybe_date]\n\nOnce read, this book will provide a new favourite ingredient or meal to the reader, and then it will be destroyed.
follows->covers the recipes from
storyStruggles->offers a peek into the realm of vibrant, unfamiliar ingredients
storyStruggles->takes a deep dive into discovering exciting, novel ingredients
storyStruggles->strives to illuminate the potential of new and adventurous ingredients
storyStruggles->embarks on a journey to reveal the magic of undiscovered culinary gems
storyStruggles->provides a fresh perspective on using innovative and tantalizing ingredients
storyStruggles->ventures into the uncharted territory of intriguing, new ingredients
storyStruggles->showcases the allure and versatility of bold, underexplored ingredients
chef->chef
chef->culinary artist
chef->gastronomer
follows->lists the recipes from
chef->head cook
chef->kitchen maestro
chef->cuisine expert
chef->pastry chef
chef->sous chef
chef->food specialist
chef->gourmet chef
writingQualityAdjective(quality==6)->remarkably well-written
writingQualityAdjective(quality==5)->smart and insightful
writingQualityAdjective(quality==4)->thoughtful and eloquent
protagHe->he
writingQualityAdjective(quality==3)->well-written
writingQualityAdjective(quality==2)->mediocre
writingQualityAdjective(quality==1)->poorly-written
writingQualityAdjective(quality==0)->nearly-incoherent
writingQualitySentence(quality[greater_than]4)->It is [excellentDesc] [excellentExtra]
writingQualitySentence(quality[less_than]5,quality[greater_than]1)->It is [decentDesc] [decentExtra]
writingQualitySentence(quality[less_than]2)->It is [awfulDesc] [awfulExtra]
excellentDesc->a thoughtful exploration of the culinary spirit
excellentDesc->deeply insightful about the complexity of cooking
excellentDesc->tightly-written and rich with exotic creations
protagHis->his
excellentDesc->creative and original
excellentDesc->wildly original and remarkably well-crafted
excellentDesc->filled with relatable humorous kitchen anecdotes
excellentExtra->. Each recipe's description flows naturally into the next
excellentExtra->. It is a page-turner and very hard to put down, each recipe better than the previous one
excellentExtra->. Its recipes constantly blow the reader's mind
decentDesc->a decent dish collection
decentDesc->interesting and engaging, with neat culinary ideas
decentDesc->focused on one interesting culinary technique
decentDesc->somewhat humorous from time to time
protagHim->him
decentDesc->appealing to a certain type of cook
decentExtra-> but has some awful cooking omissions
decentExtra-> but its recipes are often hard to follow
decentExtra-> but is riddled with cooking errors
decentExtra-> but lacks any deep complexity to its recipes
decentExtra-> but the recipes are trite and simplistic
decentExtra-> but the author constantly uses words inappropriately in an attempt to sound smart
decentExtra-> but there is a huge text wall detailing the author's inane travel experiences before each recipe. Just give us the recipe!
decentExtra-> but the writing is excessively flowery
decentExtra-> but many of the ingredients on its recipes are unnecessary and add nothing to their flavours
storyStruggles->tries to give some insight into new, exciting ingredients
awfulDesc->very poorly written, as if created by an amateur chef,
awfulDesc->written by someone who should never work in a kitchen
awfulDesc->full of irrelevant anecdotes that add nothing to the dish being described
awfulDesc->hard to follow
awfulDesc->lacking in engaging dishes
awfulDesc->presenting very bizarre dishes, yet unoriginal
awfulDesc->far, far too long, filled with redundant recipes
awfulExtra-> and the recipes are borderline incoherent
awfulExtra-> and the recipes are extremely hard to follow
awfulExtra-> and some of the recipes sound like they would outright kill you
storyStruggles->aims to explore the world of bold, innovative ingredients
awfulExtra-> and the recipes lack any sense of theme or meaning
awfulExtra-> and its recipes don't present any interesting ideas at all
awfulExtra-> and its recipes are bland and tasteless
awfulExtra-> and by the looks of it it's basically a guide to getting food poisoning
awfulExtra-> and it tends to substitute ingredients for lower-quality alternatives
maybe_date->
maybe_date->The book was published [date_form].
maybe_date->The text was first printed [date_form].
maybe_date->It's unclear exactly when the book was written.
date_form->recently
storyStruggles->delves into the discovery of fresh and thrilling flavours
date_form->many centuries ago
date_form->on the [date]
date_form->in [date_season]
bookType(p=4)->cookbook
bookType(p=2)->recipe book
bookType->culinary guide
bookType->recipe handbook
bookType->kitchen guide
bookType->cuisine guide
bookType->cooking reference
storyStruggles->seeks to uncover the secrets of unique and exotic ingredients
LanguageData.VCEV_CookingBook_Namer.rulePack.rulesStr: titleBasic->Fire and Smoke: A Griller's Guide to [subject_primary]
titleBasic->Quick and Easy Weeknight Meals of [subject_primary]
LanguageData.ArtDescription_Hearth.rulePack.rulesStri: physical_description_root->The hearth is engraved with a [depiction] of [image]. [desc_sentence_group]
physical_description_root->The hearth is engraved with a [depiction] of [image]. [desc_sentence_group]
LanguageData.VCE_MealArtDescriptionRoot.rulePack.rule: r_art_description->A [decadent] [cut] of [preparation_method] [protein], [descriptor_importance]. [Carefully] [preparation_method] [delicate] [strands] of [vegetable1] add a [refined_contrast], while [delicate] [preparation_method] [vegetable2] [lends] [descriptor] and [descriptor] to the composition. A [whisper] of [condiment1], [descriptor_effects], intertwining with the [whisper] of [condiment2] for a truly [elevated] experience. [artistic_precision], each element is [goal_of_the_meal].
LanguageData.VCE_MealDescriptionUtility_Global.rulePa: preparation_method->flawlessly whipped into a velvety texture
preparation_method->shaped into a work of art
preparation_method->kissed by moonlight and slow-aged in crystal chambers
preparation_method->hand-massaged by expert chefs under symphonic vibrations
preparation_method->delicately smoked over ancient spell-infused woods
preparation_method->fermented under the watchful gaze of a Michelin-starred monk
preparation_method->bathed in a reduction of tears from a joyfully weeping sommelier
descriptor_importance->stands as the pinnacle of refined indulgence
descriptor_importance->serves as the crowning jewel of this creation
descriptor_importance->anchors the dish in a symphony of flavors
descriptor_importance->defines the very essence of culinary luxury
descriptor_importance->elevates the composition to unparalleled heights
descriptor_importance->sets the stage for a truly transcendent experience
descriptor_importance->acts as the foundation of this gastronomic masterpiece
descriptor_importance->weaves the soul of this haute cuisine spectacle
descriptor_importance->embodies the artistry of elite craftsmanship
descriptor_importance->ushers in an opulent journey of taste
descriptor_importance->represents the apex of gastronomic sophistication
descriptor_importance->delivers a sublime expression of culinary excellence
descriptor_importance->forms the backbone of this unparalleled delight
descriptor_importance->radiates elegance in every delicate bite
descriptor_importance->unfolds into a tale of luxury and precision
descriptor_importance->sourced from the finest purveyors, ensuring unmatched quality
descriptor_importance->hand-selected for its exquisite marbling and tenderness
descriptor_importance->carefully aged to deepen its rich, complex flavors
descriptor_importance->sustainably harvested to preserve its natural purity
descriptor_importance->sourced from heritage breeds known for superior taste
descriptor_importance->cultivated with precision to achieve peak texture
descriptor_importance->ethically raised to embody both luxury and responsibility
descriptor_importance->prized for its delicate balance of flavor and succulence
descriptor_importance->chosen for its velvety texture and unparalleled depth
descriptor_importance->elevated through expert craftsmanship and culinary artistry
descriptor_importance->sourced from pristine waters, ensuring a pure, clean finish
descriptor_importance->hand-carved to highlight its most tender portions
descriptor_importance->infused with subtle notes that enhance its natural character
descriptor_importance->nurtured in ideal conditions to develop its luxurious profile
descriptor_importance->renowned for its silky mouthfeel and rich, decadent taste
descriptor_importance->a testament to the heights of culinary craftsmanship
descriptor_importance->the embodiment of refined taste and sophistication
descriptor_importance->curated for those who seek only the extraordinary
descriptor_importance->a rare indulgence reserved for the most discerning palates
descriptor_importance->a harmonious fusion of flavor, texture, and artistry
descriptor_importance->an opulent expression of gastronomic excellence
descriptor_importance->a flawless balance of delicacy and depth
descriptor_importance->a creation that transcends mere sustenance
descriptor_importance->the purest expression of haute cuisine
descriptor_importance->an unparalleled experience in every bite
descriptor_effects->adding a touch of refined complexity
descriptor_effects->rounding out the dish with finesse
descriptor_effects->weaving through the flavors like a gentle thread
descriptor_effects->brightening the palate with subtle vibrancy
descriptor_effects->balancing the elements with effortless grace
descriptor_effects->leaving a lingering impression of sophistication
descriptor_effects->infusing the dish with a delicate warmth
descriptor_effects->adding a touch of aromatic intrigue
descriptor_effects->weaving a gentle contrast into the profile
descriptor_effects->melding seamlessly into the dish’s depth
descriptor_effects->providing a soft counterbalance to bolder elements
descriptor_effects->softening the dish’s sharper notes with grace
descriptor_effects->imbuing the plate with a whisper of luxury
descriptor_effects->elevating the aroma to a new dimension
descriptor_effects->drawing out the deeper layers of taste
descriptor_effects->bringing a refined silkiness to each bite
descriptor_effects->melding harmoniously into the overall composition
descriptor_effects->offering a final flourish of sophistication
descriptor_effects->creating a seamless bridge between flavors
descriptor_effects->adding a touch of delicate refinement
descriptor_effects->softly rounding out the flavor profile
descriptor_effects->introducing an air of understated elegance
descriptor_effects->offering a whisper of floral complexity
descriptor_effects->enhancing the interplay of textures and tastes
descriptor_effects->melting effortlessly into the dish’s richness
descriptor_effects->heightening the overall balance of flavors
descriptor_effects->drawing out a subtle sweetness beneath the surface
descriptor_effects->adding a measured contrast to the composition
descriptor_effects->infusing the dish with a quiet sophistication
descriptor_effects->layering in a restrained but essential nuance
descriptor_effects->deepening the natural warmth of the dish
descriptor_effects->weaving an intricate thread of complexity
descriptor_effects->balancing the richness with a gentle lift
descriptor_effects->melding into the dish with seamless harmony
descriptor_effects->gently coaxing out hidden depths of flavor
descriptor_effects->introducing a refined yet barely perceptible finish
artistic_precision->arranged with flawless attention to detail
artistic_precision->designed as a feast for the eyes
artistic_precision->showcased in a composition of refined elegance
artistic_precision->assembled like a work of fine art
artistic_precision->presented with a flourish of haute cuisine
artistic_precision->balanced with a striking aesthetic contrast
artistic_precision->garnished with a delicate, thoughtful touch
artistic_precision->arranged to evoke a sense of grandeur
artistic_precision->plated with impeccable balance and grace
artistic_precision->designed with an eye for symmetry and flow
artistic_precision->layered to create a striking visual contrast
artistic_precision->styled to resemble a living tableau
artistic_precision->presented with a touch of minimalist elegance
artistic_precision->framed on the plate like a gallery-worthy piece
artistic_precision->elevated with a sense of refined artistry
artistic_precision->assembled with the precision of a master jeweler
artistic_precision->garnished with a painter’s delicate brushstroke
artistic_precision->designed with a seamless blend of form and function
artistic_precision->shaped with the delicate hand of a sculptor
artistic_precision->presented in an arrangement of effortless beauty
artistic_precision->plated to highlight every exquisite detail
artistic_precision->showcased with striking contrast and harmony
artistic_precision->balanced between elegance and bold expression
artistic_precision->infused with a sense of poetic movement
artistic_precision->designed to highlight every nuanced texture
artistic_precision->gilded with edible gold and delicate accents
artistic_precision->formed into a captivating, sculptural silhouette
artistic_precision->delicately layered with precision and intent
artistic_precision->structured to highlight the dish’s organic elegance
artistic_precision->crafted with haute couture culinary sensibility
artistic_precision->framed in a delicate yet bold aesthetic
goal_of_the_meal->meticulously placed to create a symphony of flavors
goal_of_the_meal->harmonized to offer a seamless gastronomic experience
goal_of_the_meal->arranged to showcase the dish’s refined elegance
goal_of_the_meal->composed to delight both the eye and the palate
goal_of_the_meal->structured to highlight its intricate balance
goal_of_the_meal->perfected to ensure every bite is an indulgence
goal_of_the_meal->crafted to evoke a sense of culinary artistry
goal_of_the_meal->layered to deliver a journey through taste and texture
goal_of_the_meal->orchestrated to celebrate the beauty of fine dining
goal_of_the_meal->shaped to offer a multisensory delight
goal_of_the_meal->designed to enhance its exquisite depth
goal_of_the_meal->balanced to create an unforgettable dining experience
goal_of_the_meal->curated to reflect culinary mastery at its finest
goal_of_the_meal->finessed to perfection, leaving a lasting impression
goal_of_the_meal->aligned to ensure a flawless tasting experience
goal_of_the_meal->woven together to create an opulent indulgence
goal_of_the_meal->refined to elevate even the subtlest nuances
goal_of_the_meal->arranged with intention to maximize its sophistication
goal_of_the_meal->crafted to deliver a moment of pure luxury
goal_of_the_meal->brought together in an exquisite culinary composition
goal_of_the_meal->placed with intent to evoke harmony and balance
goal_of_the_meal->arranged to accentuate the dish’s refined complexity
goal_of_the_meal->carefully positioned to ensure a seamless flavor experience
goal_of_the_meal->designed to complement the dish’s intricate layers
goal_of_the_meal->crafted to highlight the interplay of taste and texture
goal_of_the_meal->orchestrated to create a symphony of flavors
goal_of_the_meal->harmonized to reflect the pinnacle of fine dining
goal_of_the_meal->balanced to deliver an effortlessly elegant experience
goal_of_the_meal->woven together to form a masterpiece of culinary artistry
goal_of_the_meal->placed with precision to showcase its depth and vibrancy
goal_of_the_meal->aligned to create an exquisite visual and sensory delight
goal_of_the_meal->structured to lead the palate through layers of indulgence
goal_of_the_meal->perfected to elevate the dish to a true work of art
goal_of_the_meal->meticulously layered to offer a refined tasting experience
goal_of_the_meal->designed to highlight both contrast and cohesion
goal_of_the_meal->curated to ensure every bite is a moment of indulgence
goal_of_the_meal->elevated to provide an unparalleled dining experience
goal_of_the_meal->arranged to capture the essence of culinary sophistication
goal_of_the_meal->composed to leave a lasting impression of refinement

Sentence_CharmAttemptAccepted.rulePack.r.li: sent->[RECIPIENT_nameDef] was eager to hear more.

Sentence_CharmAttemptRejected.rulePack.r.li: sent->[RECIPIENT_nameDef] already had enough of it.
sent->[RECIPIENT_nameDef] looked around the room in boredom.
